accounts.name: Qiddiya
accounts.tip: Incumbent PMIS advisor. PIF entertainment giga-programme $40B+. Oracle/SAP/P6/Aconex deployed. Programme Governance & Digital Twin Phase 2.

engagements.oppDescription: Multi-contractor portfolio governance redesign as Qiddiya transitions to city-scale delivery. EPS baseline reset, schedule integrity framework for the 2030 Expo deadline.

Move from Omniverse POC to live operational twin — use case definition, IoT data governance, asset information requirements for FM handover. Ivan is the only advisor with live Omniverse deployment on this programme.
With PIF mandating 20% spending cuts, QIC leadership needs independent validation of EPC-reported delivery data for PIF board reporting. EY's independence from all EPCs is the structural credential.

accounts.name: SAR
accounts.tip: Saudi Arabia Railways. Schedule Health & EPMO design. 18-month bid familiarity. Landbridge $7B PPP.

engagements.oppDescription: SAR relies on EPC-submitted P6 schedules with no confirmed owner-side baseline governance. Independent health assessment across Landbridge, Qiddiya link, and network expansion.

SAR is managing multiple concurrent capital programmes with no unified owner-side EPMO producing portfolio intelligence. Design the EPMO operating model, controls framework, and reporting architecture.
OAC deployed for finance — capital project delivery data not integrated. The gap between financial reporting and programme delivery means SAR cannot present a coherent ROI picture to PIF.
SAR has publicly confirmed Digital Twin and 5G monitoring ambitions for track infrastructure. Long-life rail assets create the strongest Digital Twin business case of any infrastructure class.

accounts.name: Expo 2030 Riyadh
accounts.tip: RFP active. Bechtel PMC. Owner-side assurance above Bechtel. 6km², 42M visitors, Oct 2030 hard deadline. Budget protected from PIF cuts.

engagements.oppDescription: Concept proposal scoping EY's role as independent programme adviser above Bechtel PMC for Expo 2030 Riyadh.
ERC receives all construction intelligence through Bechtel. Independent advisory: is the delivery trajectory credible for Oct 2030? Are 226 pavilion packages converging on schedule?
PMIS architecture managing owner-delivered infrastructure and 246 participant-delivered pavilions in a single programme intelligence framework.
Integrated Command & Control for 42M visitors across 6km². Ivan's TASMU and KSPF iCCC experience is the direct credential.
Post-Expo, 6km² becomes Global Village permanent district. Full-lifecycle advisory: asset information management, FM data governance, Digital Twin continuity.

accounts.name: FIFA 2034 · WCA34
accounts.tip: RFP active. 15 stadiums, 5 cities, chaired by Crown Prince MBS. Governance crisis live. Qiddiya & New Murabba contain FIFA 2034 stadiums.

engagements.oppDescription: Concept proposal scoping owner-side programme governance across 15 FIFA 2034 stadium sites in 5 cities.
15 stadiums across 5 cities, each with a separate PMC or EPC — WCA34 needs a unified owner-side programme intelligence framework.
WCA34 has committed to technology redefining how fans interact at matches. Smart stadium strategy, Digital Twin for venue operations, iCCC for tournament operations.
FIFA imposes formal delivery milestones and stadium certification requirements. Independent advisory: are 15 programmes on credible trajectories for the June 2034 tournament?
15 stadiums, 50+ organisations producing BIM models in different formats. Without ISO 19650 at portfolio level, WCA34 will receive disconnected asset data.

accounts.name: ROSHN Group
accounts.tip: PIF housing developer. $120B+ portfolio. PMWeb award-winning but ERP integration gap structural at multi-region scale.

engagements.oppDescription: Concept proposal scoping EPMO governance redesign as ROSHN scales to 7+ active regions simultaneously.
As ROSHN scales to 7+ regions, the EPMO governance model needs redesign — decision rights, cost consolidation architecture, and contractor management.
With 20% PIF spending cuts mandated, ROSHN leadership needs ongoing independent programme assurance across 7+ regions.
The ERP to PMWeb cost reconciliation gap is structural at portfolio scale. Ivan has solved this on Oracle at Qiddiya — the advisory is transferable.

accounts.name: King Salman Park
accounts.tip: $38B · 17.2km² · 2027 opening. Seven warm contacts. Parsons PMO. Digital Twin & iCCC mandates open.

engagements.oppDescription: Concept proposal scoping owner-side programme intelligence mandate above Parsons PMO at King Salman Park Foundation.
Independent review of programme performance above Parsons' delivery reporting. Is the schedule data accurate? Are cost-to-complete figures defensible?
70,000 daily visitors projected. An Integrated Command & Control Centre is a mandatory operational requirement at this scale. Ivan's TASMU iCCC experience is the direct advisory credential.
CEO confirmed Digital Twin in active development. The governance layer — data architecture, CDE design, asset information requirements — is open. Ivan's Omniverse POC is the direct credential.
With 2027 opening target, KSPF is approaching the handover phase. ISO 19650 asset information requirements, BIM-to-FM data governance, operational readiness advisory.

accounts.name: Diriyah (DGDA)
accounts.tip: $63B UNESCO heritage programme. Mace Consult sitewide PMC. $1.5B Arena Block awarded June 2025.

engagements.oppDescription: DGDA receives all programme data through Mace. Independent advisory layer: is Mace's schedule and cost reporting accurate? Are packages converging on the 2027 Arena Block target?
A UNESCO World Heritage Site has asset information requirements beyond standard BIM governance — heritage documentation, conservation records, regulatory compliance.
As Diriyah accelerates with multiple packages, an owner-side cost control framework above Mace is the governance gap.
Active construction + UNESCO conservation creates a unique Digital Twin mandate. Ivan's Omniverse experience is the credential.

accounts.name: King Salman Airport
accounts.tip: $30B · 57km² · 3 PMCs simultaneously: Mace, Bechtel, Parsons. Hard deadlines: Expo 2030 + FIFA 2034.

engagements.oppDescription: Concept proposal scoping owner-side programme governance above Mace, Bechtel, and Parsons delivery chains at KSIA.
Three firms each managing separate scopes across 57km². KSIADC needs owner-side intelligence above all three firms simultaneously.
Airport must be operational for Expo 2030. Independent assurance: is the current delivery trajectory credible for a 2030 operational opening?
Designed by Jacobs and Foster+Partners, delivered by Mace, Bechtel, and Parsons — five organisations producing disconnected asset data without ISO 19650 governance.
KSIA designed as an aerotropolis — 9 terminals, 6 runways, 57km² of airside and landside operations.

accounts.name: Saudi Aramco
accounts.tip: $40B+ annual capex. Worley GES+ contract. SAP↔PMIS cost reconciliation structural problem. Highest single fee in portfolio.

engagements.oppDescription: Structural mismatch between SAP PS/MM/FI actuals and PMIS committed/forecast data across Aramco's capital portfolio. Ivan resolved this at sovereign scale.
Initial assessment of capital programme controls maturity across Aramco's $40B+ annual capex portfolio.
With $40B annual capex and dividend cuts creating pressure, Aramco needs independent assessment: are schedules trustworthy? Are cost-to-complete figures defensible?
An owner-side PMIS strategy advisory: is the current architecture fit for purpose at Aramco's scale?

accounts.name: New Murabba
accounts.tip: $38B · 3 PMCs (Bechtel/Turner/AECOM). Contains FIFA 2034 stadium. Naver Cloud MoU.

engagements.oppDescription: Concept proposal scoping owner-side PMIS strategy to consolidate data from Bechtel, Turner Arabia, and AECOM reporting chains.

engagements.oppTitle: Owner-Side PMIS Strategy Above Three PMCs
engagements.oppDescription: Three PMCs producing three report formats — NMDC cannot see the programme as a whole. Define the owner-side PMIS architecture consolidating all three PMC chains.
Three PMCs submitting P6 schedules in different EPS structures with no owner-side baseline governance.
New Murabba's programme interface with FIFA 2034 stadium delivery creates a hard deadline governance requirement.

accounts.name: Khazna Data Centers
accounts.tip: 30+ facilities. $26.2B financing. Stargate UAE partner. NexOps/Presight AI launched Feb 2026.

engagements.oppDescription: Concept proposal scoping handover intelligence architecture connecting Turner & Townsend construction delivery to NexOps operational systems.
NexOps has 5,000 operational documents but the data architecture connecting T&T construction delivery to NexOps operational systems is open. ISO 19650, BIM-to-FM, commissioning data integration.
Presight AI provides the platform. The governance framework above it — data quality standards, integration architecture — is open.
T&T manages construction delivery but Khazna leadership needs owner-side portfolio visibility across 30+ simultaneous construction and expansion phases.
With $26.2B financing and active international expansion, Khazna's programme governance model needs to scale globally.

accounts.name: Red Sea Global
accounts.tip: IOC Operating Model delivered — warm relationships. PIF spending cuts heaviest here. Phase 1 resorts operational.

engagements.oppDescription: IOC Operating Model is in place. The maturity question: is the IOC producing the operational intelligence RSG leadership needs? This is the next advisory mandate.

Phase 1 operational + Phase 2+ construction active simultaneously across a Belgium-scale footprint. Governing a programme that is simultaneously building and operating requires a governance architecture most advisors have never designed.
RSG under heaviest spending pressure of any PIF giga-project. Leadership needs ongoing independent ROI validation to present a credible case to PIF leadership.
As Phase 1 assets hand over from construction to operations, data quality of what PMCs deliver to RSG FM teams becomes a live operational risk.

accounts.name: TAQA
accounts.tip: Abu Dhabi integrated utilities. AED 75B investment pipeline to 2030. ~27GW new capacity. Multi-segment capital portfolio across generation, water, T&D.

engagements.oppDescription: Concept proposal scoping owner-side programme controls and PMIS governance across TAQA's multi-segment capital portfolio.
Owner-side capital programme controls and PMIS governance across generation, water and T&D portfolio — exactly the scale where no single owner-side controls layer currently exists.
Digital Twin operational intelligence and ISO 19650 information management across TAQA's generation, water, and T&D asset portfolio.

accounts.name: Abu Dhabi Master Developers
accounts.tip: Aldar · Miral · MODON. EY audit relationships across UAE master developer ecosystem. Multi-asset Oracle PMIS governance.

engagements.oppDescription: Concept proposal scoping Oracle PMIS governance for Aldar Properties capital programme.
Concept proposal scoping Oracle PMIS governance for Miral capital programme.

Oracle PMIS governance and capital controls across Aldar Properties, Miral, and MODON — combined capital deployment creating programme oversight complexity no single developer has resolved at portfolio level.
Digital Twin lifecycle advisory and multi-asset portfolio controls across the combined master developer capital portfolio.

accounts.name: TASMU
accounts.tip: Qatar Smart City Programme. Incumbent delivery context — post-deployment expansion and iCCC advisory re-engagement.

engagements.oppDescription: Initial re-engagement scoping with TASMU programme leadership on iCCC governance continuity and platform evolution.

engagements.oppTitle: Smart City Platform Evolution & iCCC Governance
engagements.oppDescription: Post-deployment platform evolution: extending the iCCC into new operational domains, integrating with ongoing capital delivery programmes, and building the digital twin operational intelligence layer.
Digital Twin operational intelligence and post-deployment asset performance advisory — the layer not included in the original build mandate.
